name: test_logout_page
description:
Test: Verify the log out page functionality.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the log in page (autouse fixture).
2. Log in as a nurse and choose team if necessary.
3. Navigate to the log out page.
4. Verify the log out page is displayed correctly.
5. Click the log out button and verify redirection to the start page.
Verification:
- Log out page is displayed with the correct heading.
- After logging out, the start page link is visible.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Verify the log out page functionality.
Steps:

  1. Navigate to the log in page (autouse fixture).
  2. Log in as a nurse and choose team if necessary.
  3. Navigate to the log out page.
  4. Verify the log out page is displayed correctly.
  5. Click the log out button and verify redirection to the start page.
    Verification:
  • Log out page is displayed with the correct heading.
  • After logging out, the start page link is visible.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for get_by_role("heading", name="Log out")
statusTrace:
log_in_page = <mavis.test.pages.log_in.LogInPage object at 0x7f71ae3ec680>
log_out_page = <mavis.test.pages.log_in.LogOutPage object at 0x7f71adf75310>
users = {'healthcare_assistant': User(username='whitehousethomas@example.com', password='whitehousethomas@example.com', role='..., 'prescriber': User(username='clarejenkins@example.org', password='clarejenkins@example.org', role='prescriber'), ...}
team = Team(name='Watson PLC est. 1655', workgroup='M180M', careplus_venue_code='M180M', email='gedwards@example.com', phone='+447700 900 061')

    def test_logout_page(log_in_page, log_out_page, users, team):
        """
        Test: Verify the log out page functionality.
        Steps:
        1. Navigate to the log in page (autouse fixture).
        2. Log in as a nurse and choose team if necessary.
        3. Navigate to the log out page.
        4. Verify the log out page is displayed correctly.
        5. Click the log out button and verify redirection to the start page.
        Verification:
        - Log out page is displayed with the correct heading.
        - After logging out, the start page link is visible.
        """
        log_in_page.log_in_and_choose_team_if_necessary(users["nurse"], team)
        log_out_page.navigate()
>       log_out_page.verify_log_out_page()
